zh.Montbélard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France: 法國福朗-可特艾度布斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Marie de Châtillon於1363年出生在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯時，她的父親Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse60歲，母親Marie de Clacy64歲。她和Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing至少有1個女兒。她去世在法國瑟-吉馬內米奧。

zh-hans.Montbélard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France: 法国福朗-可特艾度布斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne Marie de Châtillon于1363年出生在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯时，她的父亲Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse60岁，母亲Marie de Clacy64岁。她和Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing至少有1个女儿。她去世在法国瑟-吉馬內米奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Marie de Châtillon was born in 1363, in Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, her father, Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse, was 60 and her mother, Marie de Clacy, was 64. She had at least 1 daughter with Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing. She died in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Marie de Châtillon est née en 1363, à Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Marie de Clacy, avait 64 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing. Elle est décédée à Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Marie de Châtillon 1363 in Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse 60 und ihre Mutter Marie de Clacy 64. Sie hatte mit Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Marie de Châtillon è nata il nel 1363 nel Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Marie de Clacy, aveva 64 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing. Morì nel Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.

ja.Montbélard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France: フランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズ
ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne Marie de Châtillonが1363年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズで生まれた時，父Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuseは60歳，母Marie de Clacyは64歳であった。彼女はBlanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loingとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメアウックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Marie de Châtillon(이)가 1363년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Clacy(은)는 64세였다. 그녀는 Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 모스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Marie de Châtillon nasceu em 1363, em Doubs, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Clacy, tinha 64 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing. Ela faleceu em Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Marie de Châtillon родилась в 1363 г. в местности доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Clacy, 64. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing. Она умерла в местности мокс, сине-ет-марн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne Marie de Châtillon nació en 1363, en Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Marie de Clacy, tenía 64 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Blanchet de Bracque, seigneur de Châtillon-sur-Loing. Murió en Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, Francia.
